ddls:
CREATE TABLE "service_centers" (
  "service_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service center */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the service center */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact person's name */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the service center */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the service center */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the service center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the service center */,
  "hours" TEXT /* Hours of operation for the service center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the service center */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the service center */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the service center */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the service center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., tractor, excavator) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the equipment image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_center_equipment" (
  "service_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service center */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the equipment available at the service center */,
  "available_quantity" INTEGER /* Available quantity of the equipment at the service center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_center_id", "equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "service_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service center where the order was placed */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment rented or purchased */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was returned (if applicable) */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, delivered, returned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_service_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_center_id") REFERENCES service_centers ("service_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "service_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service center being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who left the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_service_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_center_id") REFERENCES service_centers ("service_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being paid for */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, service center manager, customer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_center_managers" (
  "service_center_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service center manager */,
  "service_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service center managed by the user */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the service center manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_center_manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_center_managers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_center_managers_service_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_center_id") REFERENCES service_centers ("service_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "service_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service center */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analytics entry */,
  "orders" INTEGER /* Number of orders for the service center on the given date */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated by the service center on the given date */,
  "customer_satisfaction" TEXT /* Customer satisfaction rating for the service center on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_service_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_center_id") REFERENCES service_centers ("service_center_id")
)
